no_problems: No problems found considering the limit of 4 colors per tile.
error_problem_tiles: Error: the image has problematic tiles.
arg_description: Simple tool to convert PNG files to NES CHR.
arg_analyze_help: Analyze the PNG and show colors/problematic tiles.
arg_debug_help: Also saves an enlarged image of the first problematic tile.
arg_palette_help: Optional global palette with 4 colors. Format: 'r,g,b,a;r,g,b,a;r,g,b,a;r,g,b,a'
arg_lang_help: Interface language. Example: en or pt_BR
error_image_size: Image width and height must be multiples of 8. Current size: {width}x{height}
error_color_component: All color components must be between 0 and 255: {color}
error_palette_size: The palette must contain exactly 4 colors.
error_too_many_global_colors: The image has {count} colors in total. Provide a palette with --palette or use --replace to reduce it.
arg_pad_help: Pads CHR with zero bytes up to the given size. Examples: 8k, 8192
